name: Patna District Emergency Institute
raw_report: Emergency casualty 24/7 active. Dialysis 6 stations functioning. ICU 8 beds listed, but ventilator logs show only 4 active this week. General surgery OT open for appendectomy.

name: Gaya Rural Medical Center
raw_report: Renal unit open Monday-Saturday with 3 dialysis machines. Emergency ward active at night. Claims advanced surgery but no anesthesiologist roster attached; part-time surgeons listed.

name: Muzaffarpur Trauma and Critical Hub
raw_report: Trauma bay running 24x7. ICU 10 beds and oxygen plant operational. Dialysis not available in-house; referrals sent to private partner 12 km away.

name: Bhagalpur Referral Hospital
raw_report: Emergency medicine operational. Dialysis service resumed with 4 units. ICU sometimes full; two beds kept for neonatal emergencies. Oncology day-care absent.

name: Purnia Regional Health Facility
raw_report: Critical care listed as active ICU 5 beds. Dialysis outsourced. Emergency physician available but specialist surgeon available only part-time on call.

name: Ranchi Central Medical College Hospital
raw_report: ICU 14 beds, dialysis 8 machines, emergency trauma lane active. MRI and CT both active. Staff roster includes full-time nephrologist and anesthesiology team.

name: Dhanbad Steel City Care Hospital
raw_report: Emergency and trauma round-the-clock. Claims oncology surgery support; chemo pharmacy out of stock often. ICU operational but 2 ventilators under maintenance.

name: Jamshedpur Advanced Care Unit
raw_report: Dialysis daily except Sunday. Emergency room active, appendectomy support available. ICU 7 functional beds confirmed in equipment logs.

name: Lucknow Multispeciality Public Hospital
raw_report: ICU and emergency both active 24/7. Dialysis in renal wing with 10 chairs. Oncology unit and blood bank present. High patient load causes occasional delays.

name: Varanasi Acute and Renal Center
raw_report: Renal dialysis service available, emergency surgery OT active. ICU listed but bed occupancy 100 percent during weekends. Specialist doctors mostly full-time.

name: Prayagraj District Medical Institute
raw_report: Emergency care available. Dialysis machine count 2 operational out of 5. ICU expansion underway, temporary critical care beds being used.

name: Kanpur Emergency Surgical Hospital
raw_report: High-volume trauma and emergency center. Appendectomy and laparotomy available 24/7. ICU 12 beds with ventilators; dialysis not present.

name: Jaipur Metropolitan Care Hospital
raw_report: ICU, emergency, and oncology day care operational. Dialysis 5 machines running. Notes indicate one oncologist covers two shifts with part-time residents.

name: Kota Lifeline Medical Center
raw_report: Emergency unit and ICU active. Dialysis available limited slots. Claims advanced trauma but equipment sheet misses blood gas analyzer.

name: Udaipur District Health and Trauma
raw_report: Emergency trauma support active. Dialysis absent. ICU 4 beds operational and oxygen pipeline stable. Visiting surgeons available part-time.

name: Bhopal Tertiary Government Hospital
raw_report: Comprehensive emergency, ICU, and dialysis services active. General surgery and pediatric surgery available. Full-time anesthesiologist team on roster.

name: Indore Critical Access Institute
raw_report: Emergency and critical care available. ICU claims 15 beds though census shows 11 in active use. Dialysis wing active with backup generator.

name: Jabalpur Regional Clinical Center
raw_report: Dialysis and emergency care both running. ICU not fully staffed on night shifts. Surgery available including emergency appendectomy.

name: Kolkata East Care Hospital
raw_report: ICU, dialysis, emergency trauma and oncology all available. Ventilator log and staffing log both consistent. High trust record.

name: Siliguri North Bengal Medical Unit
raw_report: Emergency and ICU active. Dialysis available 3 days weekly. Notes mention shortage of trained nephro nurses.

name: Cuttack Riverfront Medical College
raw_report: Emergency, ICU and surgery services stable. Dialysis unit partially active due to one machine downtime. Blood bank operational 24/7.

name: Bhubaneswar City Specialty Hospital
raw_report: Critical care and emergency trauma available. Dialysis currently referral-only after refurbishment shutdown. Oncology OPD active.

name: Raipur Public Emergency Institute
raw_report: Emergency 24/7 and ICU 9 beds active. Dialysis 4 stations running. Surgery and anesthesia teams confirmed on full-time schedule.

name: Bilaspur District Health Facility
raw_report: Emergency active, dialysis unavailable, ICU listed but currently not operational because oxygen manifold upgrade in progress.

name: Nagpur Central Lifecare Hospital
raw_report: Emergency trauma and ICU active. Dialysis available with 7 machines. Advanced surgery claim supported by anesthesiologist and OT staffing records.

name: Pune Regional Multi-Care Hospital
raw_report: ICU and dialysis both active. Emergency care available but ambulance turnaround delays reported. Oncology chemo suite functional.

name: Aurangabad Medical and Renal Center
raw_report: Renal dialysis available, emergency and surgery active. ICU service listed with 5 beds; one ventilator marked non-functional.

name: Hyderabad South Clinical Institute
raw_report: Emergency, ICU, dialysis and oncology support all active. Multiple specialist teams including full-time nephrology and anesthesiology.

name: Warangal District Trauma Hospital
raw_report: Trauma and emergency care strong. ICU functional with limited night staffing. Dialysis service available but only 2 stations.

name: Visakhapatnam Coastal Medical Hub
raw_report: ICU, dialysis, emergency and surgery all active 24/7. Equipment logs align with claims. Suitable for high-acuity referrals.
